channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ Mod ] Fever Dream Intoxication Legacy
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
This simply mixes and mashes up various themed aesthetics together Separate branch/fork of my original "Recycled Aesthetics" ("Mashed Mixup") Afraid of Monsters, Manhunt 1, Project Crypt by 3D graphic designer Combine Super Soldier Psyskaller, Monolith, Winter, Turtle Rock Studios textures by Yoru Fancy Skies by Azuki and Informal Sky Boxes by Descardo Counter-Strike Source sky boxes from Valve Half-Life 2 sky boxes by Mag and Gryoic Deep Blue color correction by Olde No particles or sounds or scripts for online multiplayer compatibility Will not be uploaded into workshop ( it's too big anyway ), but only here to have an archive for my friends
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
This simply mixes and mashes up various themed aesthetics together Separate branch/fork of my original "Recycled Aesthetics" ("Mashed Mixup") Afraid of Monsters, Manhunt 1, Project Crypt by 3D graphic designer Combine Super Soldier Psyskaller, Monolith, Winter, Turtle Rock Studios textures by Yoru Fancy Skies by Azuki and Informal Sky Boxes by Descardo Counter-Strike Source sky boxes from Valve Half-Life 2 sky boxes by Mag and Gryoic Deep Blue color correction by Olde No particles or sounds or scripts for online multiplayer compatibility Will not be uploaded into workshop ( it's too big anyway ), but only here to have an archive for my friends

item.title: [ Mod ] ZOEY L4D1 REPLACES ZOEY L4D2
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 6
DESCRIPCIÓN ESTE MOD NO CAMBIA NADA NI NADA SOLO ES ZOEY DE L4D1 ORIGINAL REMPLAZA A ZOEY DE L4D2 QUE ES RECICLADA CON ROCHELLE DISFRUTEN DEL MOD Y A JUEGAR CON ZOEY 100 ORIGINAL DE L4D1 EN L4D2

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] Oplan Exodus
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 5
Oplan Exodus was a very tragic event in the Mamasapano on January 25, 2015. During the mission, 44 members of the Philippine National Police Special Action Force (SAF) were killed in the battle. After the incident, many families of the fallen officers were seen crying and mourning when the bodies were brought home. The event shocked the country, and people across the Philippines held ceremonies to honor the officers who died. It became one of the most emotional and remembered tragedies involving Philippine police.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 5
Oplan Exodus was a very tragic event in the Mamasapano on January 25, 2015. During the mission, 44 members of the Philippine National Police Special Action Force (SAF) were killed in the battle. After the incident, many families of the fallen officers were seen crying and mourning when the bodies were brought home. The event shocked the country, and people across the Philippines held ceremonies to honor the officers who died. It became one of the most emotional and remembered tragedies involving Philippine police.
